title: auto_learn: detect_preferences records on any user message starting with always/never/prefer/use — false positives pollute DB
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dimension: Functional Correctness. Location: src/auto_learn.rs:275-314. Violation: Flags any message under 200 chars starting with always/never/prefer/use/dont as preference; under 300 starting with no/wrong/stop/actually/instead as correction. False positives like 'use the read_file tool', 'prefer we skip tests', 'never mind' silently pollute learned_preferences which is injected into every system prompt. Refactor: gate with explicit heuristic requiring message to be pure preference, or route through an explicit /prefer slash command.
